name: CPS.EDU
message: [AI generated] CPS.EDU refers to Chicago Public Schools (CPS), one of the largest public school districts in the U.S., serving over 355,000 students in 642 schools. It provides comprehensive educational programs, including traditional, magnet, charter, and special education for students from preschool through high school. The district also offers programs for English language learners and special needs students. CPS is committed to improving public education and preparing students for their future.
